about.title: Digital Architect, expert in high-impact solutions.
about.paragraph1: My path is not linear, it's complete. I forged my skills as a Frontend Developer before diving into the complexities of Backend and Mobile. This dual expertise allows me to have a 360° vision on every product I build.
about.paragraph2: Today, I don't just code lines; I create mobile solutions that change lives. Whether for international SaaS projects or local infrastructures, my philosophy remains the same: Ship fast, but make it premium.
